channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large laughing gas canisters dumped in street, 29th March
item.description:
There are two cardboard boxes at the place mentioned containing 11 large laughing gas canisters. Please can these be appropriately disposed of.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackbrook Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Please remove

item.title: Rubbish dumped up and down Hylton and Marmadon rd, 29th March
item.description:
Collected it together and put it here with my bag of litter picking to be collected. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hylton Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household clearance waste constantly piled up, 29th March
item.description:
The owner of the building 1-10 Hermitage House runs an air bnb business & for the past 3 months has been using our estate at the back of the property (where he has built 4 more rentals) to discard of household waste & building materials. He also has a property elsewhere which is under renovation & bring the waste from there to our estate. He fills the bins on the estate up (which we pay extortionate service charges to live on) and we have a rat & fox issue. Surely this is illegal. There is a “no fly tipping” sign next to this 12ft pile of crap, who is enforcing this? This needs addressing immediately & he needs closing down. It’s a serious health & safety risk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alscot Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 29th March
item.description:
Mattress dumped on grass opposite

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Samuel Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street litter and health hazzard, 29th March
item.description:
St Andrews Drive has not been cleaned at least since last autumn (leaves still there). There are bottles, cans , dog ends and general rubbish. Clearly this street is not on your list even though I see a cleaner regularly in Carlton Parade next door.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Andrew's Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox cub, 29th March
item.description:
There is a dead fox cub and it is right outside a nursery

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas canisters, 29th March
item.description:
Several discarded gas canisters underneath the "No ball games" sign. They have been there for a few months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Streamway, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 29th March
item.description:
Aa every week, please see overflowing bin. It would be appreciated if some action can be taken to address this issue and fix it permanently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken fence overhanging pavement, 29th March
item.description:
I keep having to stop my child from walking into this overhanging fence with sharp metal parts exposed. Today they caught thei coat on it. There are also cut trees behind it which I'm concerned could fall out onto passers by.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blyth Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped settee, 29th March
item.description:
Dumped settee

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bouverie Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible abandoned vehicle in Stewartsby Close, 29th March
item.description:
This badly damaged Range Rover (EF05LWK), seems to have been abandoned for about a month. It has serious damage to the rear window & rear nearside window. There doesn't seem to be an etched chassis number on the windscreen so cannot check if the number plate is cloned

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pasteur Gardens, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence panel slipped, 29th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4-62, Weighton Road, Anerley, Greater London
